verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like radiant sunshine That comes after rain Like beautiful rest After sorrow and pain Like hope that is kindled returning again Is the wonderful peace of my Savior

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Wonderful peace, beautiful peace Wonderful peace of my Savior There's nothing on earth Can such gladness impart As this wonderful peace of my Savior

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So soft and refreshing, As sweet as the dew, A promise that cannot be broken to you A light that will shine All the long journey through Is the wonderful peace of my Savior

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It brightens earth's darkness and banishes care And helps you to carry The burdens you bear A refuge in trouble, Your sorrows to share Is the wonderful peace of my Savior

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A guardian in danger where evil is rife A mighty defender in conflict and strife A beautiful guide to that heavenly life Is the wonderful peace of my Savior
